---
title: "Marketing ROI Analysis"
author: "Aryaman Dhindsa"
date: April 2,2026
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: flatly
    self-contained: true # bundles everything into one html file
---
```{r}
#| echo = FALSE
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
        echo = FALSE,
        warning = FALSE,
        error = FALSE
)
```

# AI referencing

1. Used Google for ROI (Return on Investment) formula.

2. Did some brainstorming for cross referencing with Claude AI

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("apndx-images/claude-1.png")
knitr::include_graphics("apndx-images/claude-2.png")
knitr::include_graphics("apndx-images/claude-3.png")
knitr::include_graphics("apndx-images/claude-4.png")
```


3. Used R documentation for syntax and other useful insights.


:::{.callout-note}
Used Lecture notes for most of information.
:::
